__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Tawla,St. Benedict Medal,The Happy Prince,Peacock Ceramic Plate,Gertie the Dinosaur,Huygens' Pendulum
|rank=blue
|amount=6
|category=self
|description=Per 4 FAME Relics gained, Snail RUSH +18; FAME Relics: 120/120
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by FAME Relics]]
